metadata.name: Add a Mortgagee Clause to a Home Policy

description: A customer has refinanced their home and needs to update the mortgagee (lender) listed on their homeowner's policy.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new lender's name and address for the mortgagee clause.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the new lender's information.

nodes.task_description: Update the mortgagee clause on the policy and send proof of insurance to the new lender.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the policy and sends the required documents to the lender.
